mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.word_id, p.word_type, p.easiness, p.`interval` AS `interval`, p.repetition, p.next_review_date, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM user_word_progress p WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.next_review_date <= CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM review_log rl WHERE rl.user_id = #{userId} AND rl.word_id = p.word_id AND rl.word_type = p.word_type ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, p.next_review_date ASC, p.id ASC

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.word_id, p.word_type, p.easiness, p.`interval` AS `interval`, p.repetition, p.next_review_date, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM user_word_progress p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT word_id, word_type, COUNT(1) AS reviewed_total FROM review_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY word_id, word_type ) ra ON ra.word_id = p.word_id AND ra.word_type = p.word_type LEFT JOIN ( SELECT word_id, word_type, COUNT(1) AS reviewed_today, MAX(reviewed_at) AS last_reviewed_at FROM review_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND reviewed_at >= CURRENT_DATE AND reviewed_at < DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY word_id, word_type ) r ON r.word_id = p.word_id AND r.word_type = p.word_type WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.next_review_date <= CURRENT_DATE THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, CASE WHEN IFNULL(ra.reviewed_total, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, CASE WHEN IFNULL(r.reviewed_today, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, IFNULL(r.reviewed_today, 0) ASC, IFNULL(r.last_reviewed_at, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') ASC, p.next_review_date ASC, p.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
